Persona.description:
Voice profile for one account type used in reply generation.

`background` MUST be authentic — a true description of who is posting
(e.g. "founder of a sleep-tech startup, former RN"). Fabricated personas
and invented account histories are prohibited by the usage policy.

background.description: AUTHENTIC background of the human/brand behind the account. Never fabricated. See USAGE_POLICY.
background.title: Background

example_posts.description: Real writing samples that define the voice.
example_posts.title: Example Posts

voice_rubric.description: Distilled description of the voice (tone, quirks, register).
voice_rubric.title: Voice Rubric

Persona.title: Persona

description:
Everything a caller wants the discovery loop to know.

This is the contract a memory system (or a human-maintained config file)
renders into. Plain lists by design: the discovery loop has no opinion
about where this knowledge comes from.

avoid.description: Topics, claims, or phrasings to never use.
avoid.title: Avoid

winning_examples.description: Replies that performed well — style anchors.
winning_examples.title: Winning Examples

title: DiscoveryContext
